title: Unlocking Piano Skills
audience: Aspiring pianists struggling with sheet music
goal: Encourage viewers to download the free cheat sheet
hook: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order.

scenes.headline: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order.
scenes.voiceover: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order.

assets.description: A musician looking frustrated while reading sheet music at a piano, showing confusion and disappointment.

lines: It doesn't have to be this way.
scenes.headline: Backup headline if lines not used
scenes.voiceover: If you've ever felt lost trying to read sheet music, you're not alone. It’s frustrating to put in hours without seeing progress.

scenes.headline: Learn to play by ear
scenes.body: But what if you could learn to play the songs you love by ear? Imagine confidently playing your favorite tunes without getting stuck on complicated notes.
scenes.voiceover: But what if you could learn to play the songs you love by ear? Imagine confidently playing your favorite tunes without getting stuck on complicated notes.

scenes.headline: Transform your playing
scenes.body: With the right approach, you can transform your playing in no time.
scenes.voiceover: With the right approach, you can transform your playing in no time.

assets.description: A Black musician playing confidently at a piano in a church, smiling and enjoying the music.

voiceover_script: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order. If you've ever felt lost trying to read sheet music, you're not alone. It’s frustrating to put in hours without seeing progress. But what if you could learn to play the songs you love by ear? Imagine confidently playing your favorite tunes without getting stuck on complicated notes. With the right approach, you can transform your playing in no time. Get ready to experience the joy of music like never before. Get the free 4-chord cheat sheet!
thumbnail_concept: Frustrated student at a piano, contrasting with a confident pianist.
caption: Learn to play by ear — grab your free cheat sheet now!
